raw.subject: Beauty By Brittany in Owensboro
raw.body:
Hi,

I'm glad you're stepping back from the drama in the beauty industry. But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which could be costing you bookings from potential clients who prefer to research and book online.

I sketched a page idea that highlights your services, showcases your work, and makes it easy for customers to book their next appointment.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/beauty-by-brittany-owensboro

Let's discuss how a simple website can help you grow your business in Owensboro. I offer flat fees for local businesses like yours, and a quick call can help us get started.
